hero.subtitle: RubberIQ is the AI intake, deterministic grading, and disposal-compliance system built for independent used-tire shops. The clipboard goes in the drawer. The shop runs on rubber, not paper.

price.sub: Priced against live wholesale · margin held.

intake.head: The clipboard runs intake.
intake.body: Three pads of paper at the counter. Two whiteboards in the bay. One customer at the door waiting for a number you can't quite give them.

pricing.head: Pricing a used tire is a guess.
pricing.body: Same tread, same DOT, two different counter people, two different grades. Two different prices. The margin walks out the door.

disposal.head: Disposal is a manila folder.
disposal.body: Scrap manifests live in a drawer. The hauler shows up unannounced. When the auditor visits you turn the shop upside down to prove a tire that left last March.

how.titlePost: . Photo to price in under a minute.

intake.title: Intake
intake.body: Counter person opens RubberIQ on the bay-floor phone and snaps the sidewall. That's it. Plate and customer captured in the same screen.
intake.by: Counter or tech on the floor

intelligence.title: Intelligence
intelligence.body: Vision reads size and DOT. Deterministic grader assigns A/B/C/D/FAIL on your rules. Pricer benchmarks to live wholesale. Tire enters inventory.

action.title: Action
action.body: FAIL grades drop into the scrap queue with a hauler-ready manifest. Sellable tires go on the rack with a price. Customer hears a real number before they put the wallet away.

features.deck: Not another POS. RubberIQ sits next to what you already run and replaces the parts of the day you hate. Concrete, not buzzwordy.

intake.titlePre: A used tire becomes an order in
intake.body: Counter person snaps the sidewall. Vision pulls size + DOT week/year. Grading engine reads tread + age + flags. Pricer benchmarks against live wholesale. English or Spanish, sun or shop-fluorescent, smudged stamp or fresh.

spec.Reads: Size · load + speed · DOT cohort · sidewall flags
spec.Grades: A · B · C · D · FAIL — your constants, your trade secret
spec.Works on: Any phone with a camera, online or offline

wholesaler.body: The customer needs four 225/65R17. RubberIQ searches your own used stock AND your wholesaler accounts (Tirewire, TireConnect) in one shot, ranks by landed cost, lets you sell off the rack or order in one click — and locks the price the customer just heard.

spec.Hits: Your used rack · Tirewire · TireConnect · direct lines
spec.Locks: Quoted price on the order, not the screen

history.body: Type a plate, scan a VIN, or pick a name and the customer's whole tire history surfaces — sizes they run, grade mix on the car now, DOT cohort, last visit, what you sold them and when. No paper jacket, no Excel sheet on the back-office PC.

spec.Indexed by: Plate · phone · VIN · last name · YMM
spec.Tracks: Tires on car · grade mix · DOT cohort · sale + scrap log
spec.Alerts: Low stock · DOT age check due · scrap pickup window

disposal.body: FAIL grades auto-route to the scrap queue. RubberIQ builds the NC Scrap-Tire Cert (Parts I + II) and the PA Act 90 manifest the hauler and state need. Three-year retention on every tire, every date, every signature. Zero re-entry.

spec.Forms: NC Scrap Tire Cert · PA Act 90 · destination permit capture
spec.Trail: Tire ID · in · out · hauler · facility · 3-yr retention
spec.Built for: NC DEQ + PA DEP audits (more states landing)

proof.deck: Honest about it: RubberIQ is in early-access with a small group of independent used-tire shops. Real testimonials and logos land here as they ship.
proof.quoteBody: Real shop-owner pull-quote slot — one sentence about the specific moment RubberIQ replaced a paper-based step in the day.
proof.attribDetail: Attribution lands with the recorded interview.

pricing.titlePost: rate per shop. No per-tire fees.
pricing.body: Multi-bay and chain pricing scale down — the more shops, the lower the per-shop rate. We tune the plan on the demo, and you keep your data either way.
pricing.fine: 30-day trial · no card · cancel from settings

cta.title: See it on your floor.
cta.body: Fifteen minutes on a screen-share. Bring last week's busiest day and we'll walk it through RubberIQ in real time — your tires, your wholesalers, your scrap log.
